SEARCH
Package org.flossware.jeventbus

Class ServiceRegistryImpl

java.lang.Object
org.flossware.jeventbus.ServiceRegistryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServiceRegistry
public class ServiceRegistryImpl extends Object implements ServiceRegistry
Service registry for inter-application service discovery. Allows applications to register and lookup services.

This implementation provides a type-safe service registry where applications can register service implementations and other applications can discover them by interface type. Multiple implementations of the same interface are supported.

Example usage: ServiceRegistryImpl registry = new ServiceRegistryImpl(); // Register a service MyService service = new MyServiceImpl(); registry.registerService(MyService.class, service); // Lookup a service Optional<MyService> found = registry.getService(MyService.class); found.ifPresent(s -> s.doSomething()); // Get all implementations List<MyService> allServices = registry.getAllServices(MyService.class); // Unregister registry.unregisterService(MyService.class, service);

See Also:
  • ServiceRegistry

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServiceRegistryImpl()
    Creates a new service registry.

    Modifier and Type

  • Constructor Details

    • ServiceRegistryImpl

      public ServiceRegistryImpl()
      Creates a new service registry.

  • Method Details

    • registerService

      public <T> void registerService(Class<T> serviceInterface, T implementation)
      Registers a service implementation for the specified interface.

      The service interface must be an interface type, and the implementation must implement that interface. Multiple implementations can be registered for the same interface.

      Specified by:
      registerService in interface ServiceRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      T - the service interface type
      Parameters:
      serviceInterface - the interface class
      implementation - the implementation instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if serviceInterface or implementation is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if serviceInterface is not an interface or implementation does not implement the interface

    • getService

      public <T> Optional<T> getService(Class<T> serviceInterface)
      Returns the first registered implementation for the specified service interface.

      If multiple implementations are registered, returns the first one that was registered. Use getAllServices(Class) to get all implementations.

      Specified by:
      getService in interface ServiceRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      T - the service interface type
      Parameters:
      serviceInterface - the interface class to lookup
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the first registered implementation, or empty if none found
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if serviceInterface is null

    • getAllServices

      public <T> List<T> getAllServices(Class<T> serviceInterface)
      Returns all registered implementations for the specified service interface.

      Returns an empty list if no implementations are registered.

      Specified by:
      getAllServices in interface ServiceRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      T - the service interface type
      Parameters:
      serviceInterface - the interface class to lookup
      Returns:
      a list of all registered implementations (never null, may be empty)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if serviceInterface is null

    • unregisterService

      public void unregisterService(Class<?> serviceInterface, Object implementation)
      Unregisters a specific service implementation.

      Removes the specified implementation from the registry. If this was the last implementation for the interface, the interface entry is removed from the registry. Uses identity comparison (==) to match implementations.

      Specified by:
      unregisterService in interface ServiceRegistry
      Parameters:
      serviceInterface - the interface class
      implementation - the implementation instance to remove

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Removes all registered services from the registry.
